Immolate  

Description

2: Decrease Hitpoints by 17 per tick. Max: 72 per tick
10: Decrease AC by 3 (L25) to 16 (L36)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 72 Skill: Evocation
Casting Time: 2.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Fire
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You are surrounded by blazing flames.
Cast on other: Soandso is surrounded by blazing flames.
Effect Fades: The flames are extinguished.

Game Description

Inflicts burns on your target, causing between 17 and @2 damage every 6 seconds for 48 secs (8 ticks). Requires a fire beetle eye to cast.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Immolate

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Immolate
Focus:
Fire Beetle Eye
ClassLevel
DRU25
RNG44
Expansion:

Duration:
8 ticks

  • Sold By (9)

  • Tibrinn Ember

# Nov 22 2005 at 7:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763330025
47 posts
This is a very useful spell. It stacks with all the dot's i have to this point. Having a level 70 mage, I know that all the spells you can get are useful. The fact that you can't figure out how to use the spell does not mean that it can't be used. And this spell does not have to be quested. It can be bought. And try to pay attention in school- your spelling is horrible. I can barely read your message.

# Jul 02 2003 at 6:02 PM Rating: Decent

RAWR is all i have to say since loy came out and new ranger DoT spell was born swarm of pain 30 hp per tick and stacks with immolate 24 hp per tick then this is great thats 54 per tick added with ensaring roots and a few arrows and you have a fairly qwik kill so there it isnt bad after all 8)

# Apr 14 2003 at 12:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783644495
Scholar
33 posts
Does this stack with Flame Lick, or is it basically Flame Lick 2? I noticed they required the same component.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 22 2003 at 1:30 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) This spell is worthless because it requires Fire Beetle eye. You see Fire Beetle eyes don't stack. If they stacked this spell would be frequently.
RE: Worthless
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2004 at 7:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1623630129087
Scholar
404 posts
You must be confused. I got my first fire beetle eye at level 2, when I read that fragile human eyes could use it as a light source in your first inventory slot. Once I got the first fire spell that required a fire beetle eye, boy was I happy. I now have a greater light stone for light, so I keep the beetle eye in my last bag, to make sure I dont sell it. This looks like a good addition to my spells when I get my druid up another two levels.
▲ Page top
Use something before you judge its usefulness
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2003 at 2:44 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591767829862
Guru
316 posts
You obviously based your estimate of the spell's worthlessness entirely upon the judgements of others instead of your own experiences.

In future, please do go ahead and buy and try the spell, and then your comment is an informed opinion -- whether right or wrong, it carries far more weight that way.

Edited, Fri Jan 31 07:43:22 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Worthless
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2003 at 1:41 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591776864133
Sage
86 posts
You are right, fire beetle eyes don't stack... but you only need one of them. it doesn't consume the reagent, but rather just checks to see if you have one.
